name: Teen Character Voice
voice_prompt: A teenager around sixteen with a bright, clear voice. Gender-neutral presentation that could read as any teen. Higher pitch than adult narrators. Natural contemporary speech patterns—not trying to sound adult. Authentic emotional volatility of adolescence: eye-rolling sarcasm one moment, raw vulnerability the next.
character_context: The authentic teen voice. Not an adult performing 'young'—genuinely captures how teens actually speak and feel. For YA that respects its audience.
notes: First teen persona. Fills age gap. High pitch fills pitch gap.
